description: Nullifier reuse attempt on the same chain. The nullifier hash has already been recorded in the verifier's nullifier set from a prior valid proof submission. A conformant verifier MUST reject this to prevent double-spend of identity attestations.

metadata.author: bolyra-conformance
metadata.notes: The test harness must first submit a valid proof with this nullifier, then attempt re-submission. The nullifier set is global (not chain-scoped) so same-chain replay is caught.
